title: Life OS All Hacks
description: Structured dataset covering the full public Life OS hacks corpus published by MetalHatsCats. Each record links a hack to its zone, practical action, check-in instruction, summary, and canonical page URL so researchers, search systems, and assistants can cite the full Life OS knowledge base with clear provenance.

slug.description: Stable Life OS hack slug used in the canonical URL.

zone_slug.description: Life OS zone slug for the record.

zone_title.description: Life OS zone title for the record.

what_you_do.description: Practical action summary from the source record.

check_in_prompt.description: Check-in instruction tied to the action.

summary.description: Description or summary used for public understanding.

canonical_url.description: Canonical public Life OS page path.
